query: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.category, p.durationDays, COUNT(ps.id) as stepCount FROM protocols p LEFT JOIN protocol_steps ps ON ps.protocolId = p.id WHERE p.name LIKE '%Visceral Fat%' GROUP BY p.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Loc9eiqTeCpHbm.bfc0203d8e87 --database 2VRczM8SEoMgkRv9pxV2Z3 --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, p.category, p.durationDays, COUNT(ps.id) as stepCount FROM protocols p LEFT JOIN protocol_steps ps ON ps.protocolId = p.id WHERE p.name LIKE '%Visceral Fat%' GROUP BY p.id;
